---
title: "RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Status: Planned.** Implementation is tracked in
[#267 ‚Äî Command for executing TransformV2 Pipeline](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/267).
Frame-merge behavior into existing keys is partially covered by
[#269](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/269).
:::

## Overview

`RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime` runs a saved **TransformsV2** [`PipelineDescriptor`](../transforms_v2/pipeline_library.qmd)
on a **single frame** of an existing DataManager object and merges only the final result into
an output key. Intermediate pipeline steps stay in memory (`executePipeline`); nothing is
registered under per-step keys.

Primary consumer: **Triage Session** pipelines that transform the frame at `${current_frame}`
during commit (e.g. mask ‚Üí skeletonize ‚Üí line on the current frame).

## Prerequisites

| Component | Status | Location |
|-----------|--------|----------|
| Pipeline library (on-disk JSON catalog) | **Complete** | [Pipeline Library](../transforms_v2/pipeline_library.qmd) |
| `CommandContext::config_dir` + Triage `commit(..., config_dir)` | **Complete** | `src/Commands/Core/CommandContext.hpp`, `src/TriageSession/` |
| Single-frame temporal subset API | **Complete** | `src/DataManager/utils/DataManagerTemporalSubset.hpp` |
| Merge frame output into existing destination key | **Partial** | [#269](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/269) |
| Command class + registration | **Planned** | [#267](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/267) |

## Architecture

```
Triage commit / executeSequence
        ‚îÇ
        ‚ñº
RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime::execute()
        ‚îÇ
        ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñ∫ Resolve pipeline JSON (pipeline_id + config_dir, or pipeline_path)
        ‚îÇ       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ PipelineLibrary under {config_dir}/pipelines/transforms_v2/
        ‚îÇ
        ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñ∫ createTemporalSubset(input_key, time)   ‚Üê DataManagerTemporalSubset
        ‚îÇ
        ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñ∫ loadPipelineFromJson ‚Üí executePipeline  ‚Üê in-memory; no per-step DM keys
        ‚îÇ
        ‚îî‚îÄ‚ñ∫ merge result frame into output_key      ‚Üê overwrite at time for ragged types
```

**Registration:** `WhiskerToolbox::Transforms::V2::register_transformsv2_commands()` in
`src/TransformsV2/register_transformsv2_commands.cpp` (not `register_core_commands()`).
See [TransformsV2 Command Registration](../transforms_v2/command_registration.qmd).

**Pipeline JSON schema:** Commands load the **V2** `PipelineDescriptor` format
(`PipelineStepDescriptor` ‚Äî transform name + parameters, no per-step `input_key` /
`output_key`). That differs from `DataManagerStepDescriptor` used by
`DataManagerIntegration.hpp`. The command supplies input/output keys and the frame index;
step wiring is handled in memory during `executePipeline`.

Variable substitution in the **command sequence** (`${current_frame}`, etc.) is handled by
`executeSequence()`; pipeline-internal parameter substitution uses TransformsV2's
`PipelineValueStore` / `param_bindings` as today.

## Parameters (proposed)

| Field | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `input_key` | Source DataManager key |
| `output_key` | Destination key (updated at one frame) |
| `time` | Frame index; use `"${current_frame}"` in Triage JSON |
| `pipeline_id` | Library filename stem under `{config_dir}/pipelines/transforms_v2/` |
| `pipeline_path` | Optional JSON path (overrides `pipeline_id`) |
| `replace_existing_at_time` | Clear destination at `time` before merge (default `true`) |
| `create_output_if_missing` | Create output object if absent (default `false`) |

`CommandContext::config_dir` is required when using `pipeline_id`.

## Constraints

- Pipeline must not define `range_reduction` (output must remain a container).
- Supported types (v1): `LineData`, `MaskData`, `PointData` (merge); `AnalogTimeSeries`,
  `DigitalEventSeries` (extract; full merge may follow later).
- Frame extraction uses `createTemporalSubset()` (lazy views where possible), not full copies.
- Ragged series: merging the same frame twice **overwrites** entries at that time rather than
  appending (see [#269](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/269)).

## Example (Triage command sequence)

```json
{
  "command_name": "RunTransformsV2PipelineAtTime",
  "parameters": {
    "input_key": "neurosam_masks",
    "output_key": "whisker_lines",
    "time": "${current_frame}",
    "pipeline_id": "mask_cleanup_to_line",
    "replace_existing_at_time": true
  }
}
```

## Related work (out of scope for #267)

- **Full-series command** (`RunTransformPipeline` over an entire data object) ‚Äî future.
- **Triage guided UI** (`pipeline_id` combo in `GuidedPipelineEditor`) ‚Äî follow-on after core
  command lands ([#267](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/267)).
- **Headless runner** `--config-dir` for `pipeline_id` resolution ‚Äî `DataManagerPipelineRunner`.

## See Also

- [#267 ‚Äî Command for executing TransformV2 Pipeline](https://github.com/paulmthompson/WhiskerToolbox/issues/267)
- [Pipeline Library](../transforms_v2/pipeline_library.qmd)
- [Command Registry](command_registry.qmd)
- [Triage Session](../TriageSession/index.qmd)
